scripts.check: APP_FILTER=$(bun scripts/resolve-app-filter.ts) && bash scripts/check-lockfile.sh && bash scripts/check-template.sh && biome ci && stylelint --allow-empty-input --max-warnings 0 "**/*.css" && turbo run typecheck check:sonar test:unit --filter=$APP_FILTER --filter=@mind-palace/srs --filter=@mind-palace/cards --filter=@mind-palace/curriculum --filter=@mind-palace/vector-dungeon --filter=@mind-palace/schemas && turbo run test:e2e --filter=$APP_FILTER && npx -y react-doctor@latest . --scope changed --base main && RUST_LOG=error npx -y fallow@latest dead-code --fail-on-issues
scripts.check:fast: APP_FILTER=$(bun scripts/resolve-app-filter.ts) && bash scripts/check-lockfile.sh && bash scripts/check-template.sh && biome ci && stylelint --allow-empty-input --max-warnings 0 "**/*.css" && turbo run typecheck check:sonar test:unit --filter=$APP_FILTER --filter=@mind-palace/srs --filter=@mind-palace/cards --filter=@mind-palace/curriculum --filter=@mind-palace/vector-dungeon --filter=@mind-palace/schemas && turbo run test:e2e:fast --filter=$APP_FILTER && npx -y react-doctor@latest . --scope changed --base main && RUST_LOG=error npx -y fallow@latest dead-code --fail-on-issues
